recent_calls.summary: The user called after hours to find out the date and time of their scheduled appointment. The agent explained they could not access appointment details after hours but assured the user that the team would follow up the next business day via text or email. The user requested to be contacted with their appointment information.

The user, Nerma, called because she was unable to open a form sent by the company and wanted to provide information about heating and cooling services over the phone. The after-hours agent informed her that a live person was not available but documented her issue and urgency, assuring a callback on the next business day. Nerma acknowledged and ended the call.

The user called on behalf of Michael Hammack regarding an air conditioning system that is not heating well and expressed concern about the wait time for service. The agent confirmed the updated service address and noted the urgency for the soonest appointment, ideally the next day. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user Gabby called to follow up with Ashley from a few months ago. The agent informed Gabby that live transfers were not available after 4 PM but documented the request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended after the agent asked if there was anything else to assist with.
The user, Deborah, returned a missed call and the agent greeted her and asked how they could assist. The call ended shortly after without further discussion or resolution.
No conversation happened.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the ZIP code. The user did not respond or engage in the conversation.

The user called to leave a message for CG to reschedule an appointment and requested a callback as soon as possible. The agent confirmed the message and offered further assistance, which the user declined.
The user expressed frustration immediately upon answering the call, indicating dissatisfaction with the interaction. The call was very brief and ended abruptly with the user hanging up.

The user, Alex, called after hours regarding a bid and two estimates they received. The agent, Evie, informed Alex that a live representative was not available but documented the request for follow-up on the next business day with both estimates ready for discussion. The call ended with no further requests from Alex.

The user, John Peterson, called to request plumbing services for a leak in the stack area affecting the basement. He preferred a service appointment for tomorrow morning, and the agent noted the request to have the team confirm availability next business day. The user was satisfied with the interaction and provided positive feedback.

The user, Tammy, called to reschedule an air conditioning coil replacement appointment originally set for a day when no one would be home. The agent confirmed the details and scheduled the appointment for Saturday or after 4 PM, and Tammy declined information about maintenance programs. Tammy provided positive feedback about the AI assistant's understanding but suggested reducing repetitive confirmations.
The call was very brief with minimal interaction. The agent introduced themselves and attempted to engage the user, but the user only responded with "Hello?" before hanging up.
The call was initiated by the user but was disconnected abruptly without any conversation taking place. The agent attempted to engage the user but the call ended before any interaction occurred.

The user called to schedule a service appointment and mentioned that a service request was already put in. The agent confirmed the user's ZIP code and asked how to assist, but the user ended the call before scheduling the appointment.

The user, Sarah from Business Loan Funding, called to inform about a business line of credit opportunity and urged a callback before the review window closes. The call was brief and ended with the user providing a callback number.

The user called to inquire about service but was unable to provide the ZIP code. After the agent offered to look it up using the city and state, the user became frustrated and ended the call abruptly without completing the inquiry.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another agent. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user reported a gas leak and was advised to call 911 and their gas company. The agent then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called Budget and asked if they were speaking to a live person or a computer. The agent clarified that they are an assistant and offered to pass the user's details to the team if needed. The call ended shortly after without further requests.
The user called to check the time of their scheduled appointment and confirmed their name. The agent then transferred the call to a live operator as requested.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Deborah called to update about her air conditioner, which is still not working due to a blown compressor even after parts were installed. The agent confirmed her contact details and service address, assured her that the team would follow up, and the call ended with no further questions from Deborah.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer without issue.

The user called to request air conditioning service in Illinois, reporting that their air conditioning is completely out. The agent collected the user's full name, service address, phone number, and preferred contact method, and confirmed the details before assuring the user that a technician would be scheduled as soon as possible. The call ended with the user satisfied and the agent promising follow-up by phone.

The user called to inquire about warranty coverage for a compressor that is currently not working and needs repair soon. The agent gathered information about the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user called and requested to speak with someone. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to report an issue with their air conditioner's blower not blowing out air sufficiently and requested a revisit as soon as possible, preferably tomorrow morning. The agent confirmed the details including the updated service address and contact number, and assured the user that the team would be notified promptly. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information and thanking the agent.
The user called Budget and provided their ZIP code 63128. They expressed interest in making an appointment and mentioned customer service. The call ended shortly after without further details.
The user called to speak with a representative and provided their service address ZIP code. The agent confirmed the information and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to make an appointment and provided their ZIP code. The user expressed the need to speak to someone for scheduling but ended the call shortly after pressing a digit to presumably reach an agent.
The user Lynn requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent Sophie promptly initiated a transfer to another live agent. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user called to follow up on an estimate and job and requested to speak to an agent or representative. The call ended abruptly without further conversation or resolution.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance without any detailed conversation.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user expressed frustration about waiting and not knowing when something would arrive. The agent acknowledged the frustration and attempted to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred.

JL from American Home Shield called to reschedule an air conditioning service appointment for Duane McGowan, who needed the earliest available appointment due to a cooling issue. The agent confirmed all details including contact information and dispatch ID, and informed JL that someone from Budget would reach out shortly. JL declined additional maintenance program information and provided positive feedback on the call experience.
The user called Budget and was immediately transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, initiated the transfer without engaging in a detailed conversation.

Gregory called to schedule an emergency cooling service appointment for his air conditioner, which turns on but isn't cooling, at his home in St. Louis. The agent confirmed the details, scheduled the appointment for Saturday at 11:30 AM, and noted Gregory's interest in home maintenance programs. Gregory provided positive feedback about the clear explanations during the call.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.
The user requested to speak to an actual representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to request service for their home but was unsure about the warranty details. The call was brief and ended with the user stating they would call back later. The agent was polite and offered assistance for future calls.

The user, Celine from American Home Shield, called to get assistance with a specific dispatch number and requested to speak with a live representative. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate team. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

Caris from American Home Shields called to schedule an air conditioning repair appointment for member Jean Church. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address, dispatch number, and preferred appointment dates, and assured that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact the member by phone. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive confirmation of the summary.

The user called to provide their dispatch number and inquire about scheduling an appointment. The agent was unable to find an existing appointment and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Lynn from American Home Shield, called Budget seeking assistance with a dispatch issue and provided a dispatch number. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to confirm if a technician was still scheduled to come out today. The agent confirmed the appointment with technician Amory between 3 and 4 PM and the user had no further questions or changes. The call ended with the user's confirmation and no additional requests.
